title: Optimized Protocol for RNA Extraction from Insect Samples Using TRIzol Reagent
author: Monique da Silva Bonjour

steps.title: Cover the crucible with liquid nitrogen...
steps.instruction: Cover the crucible with liquid nitrogen to keep the sample cold

steps.title: Place the sample (about 50mg) and macerate, keeping it cold
steps.instruction: Place the sample (about 50mg) and macerate, keeping it cold. Remove the wings and macerate insect samples as they have a strong exoskeleton and the presence of chitin

steps.title: Add 1mL of Trizol and wait for it to thaw
steps.instruction: Add 1mL of Trizol and wait for it to thaw

steps.title: Mix the sample with Trizol in...
steps.instruction: Mix the sample with Trizol in the crucible and transfer to a 1.5 mL microtube

steps.title: Add 200 µL of ice-cold chloroform for phase separation
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of ice-cold chloroform for phase separation. Shake the tube vigorously by hand for a full 15 seconds. Let sit at room temperature for 2-3 minutes NOTE : You should see the two mixtures separating almost immediately: pink on the bottom and clear on top

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12000 rpm for 15...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12000 rpm for 15 min at 4° C NOTE : Any denatured proteins might appear as a white interface. Avoiding this interface, carefully move the clear top liquid to a new clean, labeled tube

steps.title: Remove 500 µL of supernatant and...
steps.instruction: Remove 500 µL of supernatant and add 400 µL of ice-cold isopropanol to precipitate the RNA (always 100 µL less)

steps.title: Leave 10 minutes at room temperature NOTE
steps.instruction: Leave 10 minutes at room temperature NOTE : Leaving to precipitate in the -20°C is not recommended because it might cause contaminants to co-precipitate

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12000 rpm for 10 min 4° C NOTE
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12000 rpm for 10 min 4° C NOTE : You may see the pellet as a clear, gel-like ball at the base of the tube, or a small white smear

steps.title: Remove the isopropanol and wash with...
steps.instruction: Remove the isopropanol and wash with 1 mL of 75% ethanol

steps.title: Centrifuge at 9500 rpm for 5 min at 4° C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 9500 rpm for 5 min at 4° C

steps.title: Discard the alcohol and wait for...
steps.instruction: Discard the alcohol and wait for the pellet to dry for 5 to 10 minutes at room temperature NOTE : Remove as much of the ethanol as possible

steps.title: Resuspend in 30 µL of RNAse-free...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 30 µL of RNAse-free water depending on the size of the pellet formed
